description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named unit-test that runs on push to specific paths and branches, and on pull requests to specific paths and branches. The workflow uses a Conan recipe version job and a testing job that runs on ubuntu-22.04, checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.10, installs dependencies, creates a Conan profile, configures Conan, caches Conan packages, installs build requirements, builds and tests CuraEngine, and publishes test results.
